summary:
For proper protein synthesis in eukaryotes, both RNA polymerases responsible for mRNA transcription and functional ribosomal units essential for translating mRNAs must be operational; any deficiency would lead to significant disruptions or complete failure of this critical cellular function.

The requirement here pertains specifically towards identifying an unnecessary component among options presumably provided but isn't detailed due to lack thereof impacting direct specificity needed
